title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 84.620 - Board of police — enforcement of regulations
text:
84.620.  Board of police — enforcement of regulations. — All lawful rules and regulations made by the board shall be obeyed by the members of the police force on pain of dismissal, suspension, fine or reduction in rank or pay, or forfeiture of pay, as the board may provide.
(RSMo 1939 § 7662, A.L. 1943 p. 727 § 7665) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7531; 1919 § 8942; 1909 § 9794
